title: Germany Residence Registration (Anmeldung)
description: Register a person's sole or main residence (alleinige Wohnung / Hauptwohnung) with the local registration authority (Meldebehörde) after moving into a dwelling in Germany, as required by the Bundesmeldegesetz (BMG) within 14 days of moving in. Two channels exist: in-person registration at the local Bürgeramt/Einwohnermeldeamt (available throughout Germany), and the federal Elektronische Wohnsitzanmeldung (EWA) online service (BundID account plus eID), which is offered for municipalities to adopt and is rolling out municipality by municipality. This document is scoped to a single adult registrant moving into a sole or main residence; it does not cover secondary-residence-only (Nebenwohnung) registration, joint family registration of multiple household members in one submission, deregistration (Abmeldung), or minors registering without a guardian. It does not submit the registration; the live sources are always authoritative (see VERIFICATION.md).

authority.name: Meldebehörde (local residents' registration office, e.g. Bürgeramt/Einwohnermeldeamt), under the Bundesmeldegesetz (Federal Registration Act) and the federal Elektronische Wohnsitzanmeldung service co-run by the Bundesministerium des Innern und für Heimat

verification.notes: First DE reference schema, opening a seventh jurisdiction (alongside US, GB, IE, CA, NZ, AU — the first non-Anglophone, non-common-law source). Derived from the official Berlin.de service page for 'Wohnsitz - Alleinige Wohnung oder Hauptwohnung anmelden' (dienstleistung 120686), which cites its legal basis directly (BMG §§17, 21, 23, 23a, 24, 27) and the federal wohnsitzanmeldung.gov.de page for the Elektronische Wohnsitzanmeldung (EWA) online channel. Field-level structure cross-checked against two independent secondary transcriptions of the national Meldeschein (allaboutberlin.com, settle-in-berlin.com) and against the City of Munich's official fillable Meldeschein PDF (AcroForm field names/tooltips extracted directly from its decompressed content streams). Berlin's Bürgeramt service is used as the concrete exemplar for the in-person channel, per the same convention as us/ca/dmv for US state DMVs; the underlying legal data model is set nationally by the BMG. Status draft pending full field-by-field source review; see VERIFICATION.md for hedges, notably on the gender/marital-status enum values and two unconfirmed identity-document type codes.

fields.name: residenceType
fields.label: The new dwelling is
fields.description: Whether this dwelling is the registrant's only dwelling in Germany, or their main dwelling (if they keep more than one). A dwelling used most of the time is the Hauptwohnung; others are Nebenwohnungen. This document covers only the sole/main-residence service; registering a Nebenwohnung-only is a separate, out-of-scope service.

fields.name: moveInDate
fields.label: Move-in date
fields.description: YYYY-MM-DD. Registration is legally required within 14 days of this date (BMG §17 Abs. 2), though some Bürgerämter do not strictly enforce the deadline for a later appointment.

fields.name: newAddressPostalCode
fields.label: New address — postal code
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. German 5-digit postal code (Postleitzahl).

fields.name: newAddressMunicipality
fields.label: New address — municipality (Gemeinde)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: newAddressDistrict
fields.label: New address — district (Ortsteil, optional)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Locality/borough within the municipality, where applicable (e.g. a Berlin Ortsteil such as Mitte).

fields.name: newAddressStreet
fields.label: New address — street
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: newAddressHouseNumber
fields.label: New address — house number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: newAddressAdditional
fields.label: New address — additions (optional)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Floor, apartment number, or a "c/o"/"bei" line when the registrant's name is not on the mailbox/doorbell.

fields.name: previousResidenceType
fields.label: The previous dwelling was
fields.description: Required when the registrant had a previous dwelling in Germany. Not applicable to a first-ever registration from abroad with no prior German address.

fields.name: previousAddressPostalCode
fields.label: Previous address — postal code
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required only when the previous dwelling was in Germany.

fields.name: previousAddressMunicipality
fields.label: Previous address — municipality
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required only when the previous dwelling was in Germany.

fields.name: previousAddressStreet
fields.label: Previous address — street and house number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required only when the previous dwelling was in Germany.

fields.name: previousAddressCountry
fields.label: Previous country of residence, if moving from abroad
fields.description: Only given when moving to Germany from abroad, in place of a previous German address.

fields.name: keepingPreviousResidence
fields.label: Are you keeping the previous dwelling?
fields.description: If true, one of the registrant's dwellings (previous or new) must be declared the Hauptwohnung and the other a Nebenwohnung; that declaration is made on the separate Beiblatt/Hauptwohnungserklärung supplement, out of scope of this document.

fields.name: additionalResidencesInGermany
fields.label: Do you have other dwellings in Germany?
fields.description: Flags whether a multiple-residence declaration (Beiblatt/Hauptwohnungserklärung) is needed; that supplement is out of scope of this document.

fields.name: lastName
fields.label: Last name (incl. doctoral degree / passport name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. As it appears on the registrant's identity document, including an academic doctoral degree (Doktorgrad) where held.

fields.name: firstNames
fields.label: First name(s)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Given names as recorded on the civil-status register; the everyday first name (Rufname) is conventionally underlined on the paper form.

fields.name: birthName
fields.label: Birth name (optional)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. E.g. a maiden name, if the current last name differs from the name at birth.

fields.name: gender
fields.label: Gender
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Options are confirmed from the Munich Meldeschein PDF's own field tooltip (`/TU` on the `geschl` field, UTF-16BE): M (männlich) = male; W (weiblich) = female; D (divers) = diverse; o.A. (ohne Angabe) = unspecified. The 'divers'/no-entry option follows Personenstandsgesetz §22 Abs. 3 (in force since 2019). See VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. YYYY-MM-DD.

fields.name: placeOfBirth
fields.label: Place of birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Municipality and district (Gemeinde, Landkreis) of birth.

fields.name: countryOfBirth
fields.label: Country of birth, if born abroad
fields.description: Given in addition to placeOfBirth only when the registrant was born outside Germany.

fields.name: religiousAffiliation
fields.label: Religious affiliation (optional)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. A church or religious society entitled to levy church tax (Kirchensteuer) in Germany, e.g. Roman Catholic (rk) or Evangelical (ev); giving none means no church-tax liability is registered. Answering is voluntary but affects payroll tax withholding.

fields.name: religiousOrArtisticName
fields.label: Religious or artistic name / pseudonym (optional)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. E.g. a name taken as a member of a religious order, or an artist's/author's pseudonym used in official use.

fields.name: nationality
fields.label: Nationality/nationalities
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Free text; more than one nationality may be given.

fields.name: maritalStatus
fields.label: Marital status
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. The full official code set is enumerated on the Munich Meldeschein PDF's own field tooltip (`/TU` on the `famst` field, UTF-16BE): LD (ledig) = single; VH (verheiratet) = married; VW (verwitwet) = widowed; GS (geschieden) = divorced; LP (eingetragene Lebenspartnerschaft) = registered_civil_partnership; LV (Lebenspartner verstorben) = civil_partner_deceased; LA (Lebenspartnerschaft aufgehoben) = civil_partnership_dissolved; EA (Ehe aufgehoben) = marriage_annulled; LE (Lebenspartner für tot erklärt) = civil_partner_declared_dead; NB (nicht bekannt) = unknown. Enum values are ordered to match the form's own code sequence.

fields.name: identityDocumentType
fields.label: Identity document type
fields.description: Codes are those enumerated on the Munich Meldeschein PDF (`/Opt` array plus the `/TU` tooltip on the Pass-/Ausweisdaten field): personalausweis = PA (Personalausweis, German national ID card); reisepass = RP (Reisepass, passport); kinderreisepass = KRP (Kinderreisepass, children's passport); kinderausweis = KA (Kinderausweis, older children's ID); ankunftsnachweis = AKN (Ankunftsnachweis, asylum-seeker's arrival certificate). other = a national passport, replacement travel document, or residence-title document held by a non-German national, which the in-person Bürgeramt process accepts but which does not appear as a distinct code on the Munich form.
fields.sourceRef: "Art" (document type: PA / RP / KRP / KA / AKN)

fields.name: identityDocumentIssuingAuthority
fields.label: Issuing authority
fields.description: The authority (Ausstellungsbehörde) that issued the identity document.

fields.name: identityDocumentSerialNumber
fields.label: Document serial number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: identityDocumentIssueDate
fields.label: Document issue date
fields.description: YYYY-MM-DD.

fields.name: identityDocumentExpiryDate
fields.label: Document expiry date
fields.description: YYYY-MM-DD. Must be valid ("gültiger Personalausweis/Reisepass").

fields.name: channel
fields.label: Registration channel
fields.description: online_ewa = the federal Elektronische Wohnsitzanmeldung (EWA) service, restricted to registrants aged 18+ who are German or EU citizens, moving within Germany, and hold a BundID account plus an eID-enabled Personalausweis/eID card and PIN; in_person = an appointment at the Bürgeramt/Einwohnermeldeamt, open to any nationality from age 16 (a legal guardian registers a child under 16). The EWA online channel is offered for municipalities to adopt (the federal Einer-für-alle/Nachnutzung principle) and is rolling out municipality by municipality, so it is not yet uniformly available everywhere.

fields.name: landlordConfirmationProvided
fields.label: Landlord's move-in confirmation (Wohnungsgeberbestätigung) provided
fields.description: Required when the registrant rents; the landlord/housing provider (Wohnungsgeber) must confirm the move-in in writing within two weeks, stating their name and address (and the owner's, if different), the move-in date, the dwelling's address, and the names of everyone registering. A tenancy agreement (Mietvertrag) does not substitute for this confirmation. Not applicable to an owner-occupier.

fields.name: representativeAuthorization
fields.label: Registering via a representative (Vollmacht) provided
fields.description: Required (in_person channel only) when someone other than the registrant submits the form on their behalf: a written power of attorney plus the form, signed by the registrant themself, must be brought. Not available for the online channel except within a family unit already registered at the same address.

fields.name: minorGuardianConsentProvided
fields.label: Guardian's written consent provided (for a minor's move, where applicable)
fields.description: Required when parents with joint custody live together but only one registers a minor child's move (a written statement of consent from the absent parent), or when separated parents with joint custody move a minor child's main residence between them (the "Einverständniserklärung der Sorgeberechtigten" form). Not applicable to an adult registrant.
